sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard operational maintenance and do not imply immediate financial change.

headlines.headline: Joval Brands Chief Strategy Officer steps down unexpectedly citing personal reasons

sentiment.reasoning: The unexpected departure of a C-suite executive creates leadership instability and market uncertainty.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
